       -         1  AGGREGATE COUNT(o_orderkey) AS count_3
       -         0  LEFT ANTI JOIN HASH ON o_custkey = c_custkey
       -    150000  │└DISTRIBUTE GATHER
       -    150000  │ PROJECT true AS subquerytrue, c_custkey

 1500000   1500000  TABLE SCAN orders
queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  WHERE c.c_custkey = o.o_custkey
);

theorem.description: Count ORDERS rows without a matching CUSTOMER via NOT EXISTS
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-ANTI-ORDERS-CUSTOMER
